offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes that are time-consuming and error-prone.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of supplier credit notes against outstanding invoices.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try Manual entry for credit notes and Basic reporting for accounts payable leads on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
